questionHtml:
A cell contains chloroplasts, plasma membrane and 80S ribosomes. What type of cell could it be?

A. Bryophyte

B. Lymphocyte

C. Prokaryote

D. Neuron

meta.title: A cell contains chloroplasts, plasma membrane and 80S ribosomes. What type of cell could it be? A. Bryophyte B. Lymphocyte C. Prokaryote D. Neuron
